prompt: Create the Express.js patient ROUTES FILE ONLY (not validators) at src/routes/patient.routes.js. It must contain router.post('/'), router.get('/'), router.get('/:id'), router.put('/:id'), router.delete('/:id') with inline Joi validation, Supabase queries scoped to req.user.clinic_id, and audit_logs insert calls. Output the complete Express router file with actual route handlers — do not output a validator file.
